title: Login button overlaps footer on small screens
description: On devices with screen width below 360px the login button overlaps the footer links. This does not block login but affects UI clarity on older Android phones.

title: Delayed OTP email delivery during peak hours
description: OTP emails sometimes arrive after 40–60 seconds during peak login times. Users can still authenticate but experience confusion.

title: Password visibility icon misaligned
description: The eye icon in the password field is slightly misaligned on Firefox browser. Functional behavior is correct.

title: Payment confirmation text truncated
description: Payment success message gets cut off on smaller screens. Users can still see transaction status in history.

title: API returns extra whitespace in response fields
description: Some API responses contain leading spaces in string fields. This does not break functionality but affects formatting.

title: Session timeout warning not displayed
description: Users are logged out after inactivity without seeing the session timeout warning popup. Logout still works correctly.

title: Dashboard chart legend overlaps graph
description: Legend text overlaps bar chart when viewing reports with more than 8 categories. Data remains accurate.

title: Exported reports default to wrong date format
description: Downloaded CSV reports use MM-DD-YYYY instead of YYYY-MM-DD. This causes minor confusion for users.

title: Notification badge count not refreshing
description: Notification count does not update until page refresh. Clicking notifications still works.

title: Search input loses focus after typing
description: Cursor focus is lost after entering 3–4 characters in dashboard search. User can click again and continue.

title: Database logs show redundant warnings
description: Application logs contain repeated non-critical database warnings. No impact on performance or data.

title: Remember me checkbox not retained
description: The remember me option is not saved after browser refresh. Login still functions normally.

title: Tooltip text overlaps icons
description: Help tooltip overlaps nearby icons on hover. Content is readable but UI looks cluttered.

title: Payment history loads slowly for old accounts
description: Users with more than 2 years of payment data see slower load times. Data eventually loads correctly.

title: API error message lacks error code
description: Some API failures return messages without error codes. Debugging becomes slightly harder.

title: Incorrect icon shown for PDF reports
description: PDF report downloads display CSV icon instead of PDF icon. File content is correct.

title: Notification sound plays twice
description: Notification alert sound plays twice when multiple tabs are open. Notification itself is correct.

title: Dashboard filters reset on page reload
description: Applied filters are lost when user refreshes dashboard page. Data reloads correctly.

title: Login error message grammar issue
description: Login failure message has minor grammatical error. Functionality is unaffected.

title: Database backup status not updated instantly
description: Backup status takes few minutes to reflect latest run. Backup process itself works fine.

title: Pagination buttons misaligned on Safari
description: Next and Previous buttons appear slightly misaligned on Safari browser only.

title: Payment retry button not highlighted
description: Retry payment button does not highlight on hover. Button click still works.

title: API response time slightly higher on weekends
description: Average API response time increases by 300ms on weekends. Still within acceptable limits.

title: Report column headers not sticky
description: Column headers scroll out of view in long reports. Data remains accessible.

title: Notification preferences page scroll glitch
description: Page jumps to top when toggling notification preferences. Settings still save correctly.

title: Dashboard tooltip delay noticeable
description: Tooltip appears after noticeable delay when hovering over metrics. Does not affect data.

title: Login page background image blurry
description: Background image appears slightly blurred on high-resolution displays. Login remains usable.

title: Database query logs missing timestamps
description: Some database logs are missing timestamps making traceability harder. No data loss.

title: Payment success page scrolls automatically
description: Page scrolls down automatically after payment success. Users can scroll back manually.

title: API documentation link outdated
description: Help section points to an outdated API documentation link. API itself is unaffected.

title: Report download progress bar freezes briefly
description: Progress bar freezes at 90% for few seconds before completing download.

title: Notification bell icon slightly pixelated
description: Icon appears pixelated on retina displays. Notification functionality works.

title: Dashboard default view resets after logout
description: Preferred dashboard view is not retained after logout. User can reselect view.

title: Login captcha refresh button small
description: Captcha refresh icon is too small on mobile devices. Captcha still refreshes.

title: Database index warning on startup
description: Non-critical index warning appears during startup logs. No performance degradation noticed.

title: Payment currency symbol spacing issue
description: Extra space appears between currency symbol and amount. Amount calculation is correct.

title: API returns null for optional fields
description: Optional fields sometimes return null instead of empty string. Clients handle it safely.

title: Report table rows highlight incorrectly
description: Row highlight persists after mouse leaves table. Visual issue only.

title: Notification preview text truncated
description: Preview text cuts off after 20 characters instead of 30. Full message opens correctly.

title: Dashboard refresh icon not animated

description: Cards slightly misaligned when browser zoom is set to 110%. Content remains readable.

title: Login form autofill overlaps labels
description: Browser autofill overlaps input labels in login form. Fields still usable.

description: Graph colors do not match legend in monitoring dashboard. Data values are correct.

title: API health check shows delayed timestamp
description: Health check endpoint shows timestamp delayed by few seconds. Endpoint remains reliable.

title: Report page scroll bar flicker
description: Scroll bar flickers briefly when loading long reports. No data issues.

title: Notification pop-up closes too quickly
description: Pop-up auto-closes faster than expected. Users can still access notifications from panel.

title: Dashboard export button misaligned
description: Export button shifts slightly when hovering. Export works correctly.

description: Timeout error message lacks warning icon. Text message is displayed.

description: Alert email subject does not specify severity. Email body contains correct info.

title: Payment modal closes unexpectedly
description: Payment modal closes if user clicks outside unintentionally. Payment can be reopened.

title: API pagination default size inconsistent
description: Default page size differs between endpoints. Clients can override size.

title: Report totals row not highlighted
description: Totals row is not visually distinct from other rows. Values are correct.

title: Notification badge color low contrast
description: Badge color has low contrast in dark mode. Notification count is visible.

title: Complete database server crash
description: Database server crashed unexpectedly. All connections lost. System completely down for 10 minutes.

title: Database corruption detected
description: Critical database corruption detected in user table. Data integrity at risk. Immediate recovery needed.

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: All database connections are stuck in pending state. New connections cannot be established. System frozen.

title: Database replication failure
description: Master-slave replication broken. Data inconsistency across nodes. Risk of data loss.

title: Database deadlock cascade
description: Multiple deadlocks causing complete database stall. All transactions failing.

title: Database disk full - critical
description: Database disk 100% full. Write operations failing. System in read-only mode.

title: Database backup failure
description: Critical backup job failed for 3 consecutive days. No recoverable backup available.

title: Database performance degradation - critical
description: Query response time > 30 seconds. System nearly unusable. CPU at 100%.

title: Database security breach
description: Unauthorized access detected in database. Sensitive data potentially exposed.

title: Database transaction log full
description: Transaction log 100% full. Database refusing new transactions. Manual intervention required.

description: Suddenly all users were logged out. Database connection failed for 5 minutes. System recovered but users had to login again.

title: Database connection lost - system down
description: Critical: Database connection lost. All users logged out. System completely unavailable.

title: Connection failure - users logged out
description: Database connection failure caused all 5000 active users to be logged out. Emergency restart required.

title: Lost database connection - mass logout
description: Application lost connection to database cluster. All users forcibly logged out. Service restored after 3 minutes.

title: Critical database connection failure - all services down
description: Database connection lost completely. All microservices affected. 5000 users impacted. 15 minute outage.

title: Database connectivity lost - emergency restart required
description: Connection to primary database lost. Failover failed. Total system outage for 8 minutes.

title: Connection pool exhausted - critical failure
description: All database connections consumed. No new connections possible. Users experiencing 503 errors.

title: Network partition - database unreachable
description: Network issue caused database cluster to be unreachable. All users logged out. Manual intervention needed.

title: Database connection timeout - system unavailable
description: All database queries timing out. Application completely unavailable. Critical incident declared.

title: Company logo appears pixelated on mobile
description: Company logo is blurry and pixelated on mobile devices. Desktop version looks fine. Needs SVG version for mobile.

title: Footer copyright year shows 2025

title: Product name misspelled on homepage

title: Browser tab title shows incomplete name

description: Spinner uses default gray instead of brand blue. Inconsistent with theme.
